allow:
Bash(/' "$dst"
  echo "moved: loralinear.java → models"
fi

# move lstm, gru, bidirectional from nn to rnn
for f in lstm.java gru.java bidirectional.java; do
  src="gollek-ml-nn/src/main/java/tech/kayys/gollek/ml/nn/$f"
  dst="gollek-ml-rnn/src/main/java/tech/kayys/gollek/ml/rnn/$f"
  if [ -f "$src" ]; then
    mkdir -p "$(dirname "$dst")"
    mv "$src" "$dst"
    sed -i '' 's/package *)

Bash(/' "$dst"
    echo "moved: $f → rnn"
  fi
done

# move safetensor files from nn to safetensor module
for f in safetensorreader.java safetensorwriter.java; do
  src="gollek-ml-nn/src/main/java/tech/kayys/gollek/ml/nn/util/$f"
  dst="gollek-ml-safetensor/src/main/java/tech/kayys/gollek/ml/safetensors/$f"
  if [ -f "$src" ]; then
    mkdir -p "$(dirname "$dst")"
    mv "$src" "$dst"
    sed -i '' 's/package *)

Bash(/' "$dst"
    echo "moved: $f → safetensor"
  fi
done

for f in ggufreader.java ggufwriter.java ggufmetavalue.java ggufmetatype.java ggmltype.java; do

    mv "$src" "$dst"
    sed -i '' 's/package *)

Bash(/' "$dst"

done
